title: Justice Department Ends Probe of Fed Chair Powell
summary: The Justice Department has dropped its criminal probe of Fed Chair Powell, potentially paving the way for Warsh.

title: US Blockade Around Strait of Hormuz to Last 'as Long as It Takes'
summary: The US blockade around the Strait of Hormuz will continue indefinitely, according to Hegseth, amid ongoing tensions with Iran.

title: US Justice Department to Allow Firing Squads for Federal Death Penalty

title: US Sanctions China-Based Refinery, Shippers Over Iranian Oil

title: Body of Missing USF Student Found, Man Arrested

title: Chornobyl at 40: Settlers and Horses Survive
